CustomField.description: Overrides the org-level Post Process Implementing Class for this batch. Specifies an optional Apex class that implements BDI_IPostProcess to run custom logic after data import processing completes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the fully qualified Apex class name for custom post-processing in this batch. Leave blank to use the org-level default or no post-processing.
CustomField.label: Post Process Implementing Class
